export class OpenCorpJobBoardParser{constructor(){this._corpId=0;this._corpName='';this._isManager=false;this._openings=[];}flush(){this._corpId=0;this._corpName='';this._isManager=false;this._openings=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._corpId=wrapper.readInt();this._corpName=wrapper.readString();this._isManager=wrapper.readBoolean();const count=wrapper.readInt();this._openings=[];for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const id=wrapper.readInt();const title=wrapper.readString();const openSlots=wrapper.readInt();const isOpen=wrapper.readBoolean();const createdByUserId=wrapper.readInt();const createdAt=wrapper.readInt();// seconds
this._openings.push({id,title,openSlots,isOpen,createdByUserId,createdAt});}return true;}get corpId(){return this._corpId;}get corpName(){return this._corpName;}get isManager(){return this._isManager;}get openings(){return this._openings;}}
